chapter_title.en: Enduring minor hardships prevents greater trials

text: ٤٤٨. وَقَالَ (عليه ‏السلام): مَنْ عَظَّمَ صِغَارَ الْمَصَائِبِ ابْتَلاَهُ اللهُ بِكِبَارِهَا.

en.sayed-ali-raza: 448. Amīr al-mu’minīn, peace be upon him, said: Whoever regards small distresses as big, Allāh involves him in big ones.
